name: Energy Services of America CORP
sic_description: Water, Sewer, Pipeline, Comm & Power Line Construction
summary: Energy Services of America Corporation, formed in 2006, is a contractor and service company operating primarily in the mid-Atlantic and central United States. It provides construction, replacement, and repair services for natural gas pipelines, storage facilities, water distribution systems, and electrical/mechanical installations. The company serves natural gas, petroleum, water distribution, automotive, chemical, and power industries, reporting $411.0 million in consolidated operating revenues for fiscal year ended September 30, 2025.
